zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee是Robert le Bigod的兒子，於大約1035年10月出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維爾。他於1059年與Joan de Saint Sauver在法國諾門迪曼其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1036年住在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利聖 薩維爾。他去世於1065年在法國享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee是Robert le Bigod的儿子，于大约1035年10月出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維爾。他于1059年与Joan de Saint Sauver在法国諾門迪曼其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1036年住在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利聖 薩維爾。他去世于1065年在法国享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee was born about October 1035, in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Lower Normandy, France as the son of Robert le Bigod. He married Joan de Saint Sauver in 1059, in Manche, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in St Saveur, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France in 1036. He died in 1065, in France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee est né environ octobre 1035, à Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, fils de Robert le Bigod. Il a épousé Joan de Saint Sauver en 1059, à Manche, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à St Saveur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France en 1036. Il est décédé en 1065, à France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee wurde um Oktober 1035 in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Robert le Bigod geboren. Er hat 1059 in Manche, Normandie, Frankreich Joan de Saint Sauver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1036 hat er in St Saveur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich gelebt. Er starb 1065 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Frankreich.

Lui sposato Joan de Saint Sauver nel 1059, nel Manche, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a St Saveur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia nel 1036. Morì nel 1065, nel Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghersheeは約1035年10月にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウルでRobert le Bigodの息子として生まれた。1059年にフランスノーマンディマンチェでJoan de Saint Sauverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1036年にはフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメスト サベウルに住んでいた。彼は1065年にフランスで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee(은)는 대략 1035년 10월 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우르에서 Robert le Bigod의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1059년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체에서 Joan de Saint Sauver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1036년도에 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 스트 새브우르에서 살았다. 그는 1065년 프랑스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Joan de Saint Sauver em 1059, em Manche, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em St Saveur, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França em 1036. Ele faleceu em 1065, em França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Bigod de Burghershee родился около октябрь 1035 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция. Его отца звали Robert le Bigod. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Saint Sauver в 1059 г. в местности манч, норманди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности ст савеур, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция в 1036 году. Он умер в 1065 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 30 лет.
